articles.title: 最近让codex写代码，gpt5.5非常喜欢猜节点。做了个提示词，发现效果好很多，分享下
articles.excerpt: 最近让codex写代码，gpt5.5非常喜欢猜节点。做了个提示词，发现效果好很多，分享下： 零猜测原则：禁止把不确定性写进代码 [核心护栏] 在处理代码路径、数据结构、字段归属、调用链和业务流转时，必须先用工具取得事实依据，再编写逻辑。禁止用代码兜底来掩盖没有查清楚的问题。 事实先于实现：在未通过源码搜索、AST 扫描、文件读取、类型定义、调用点追踪、测试或终端执行确认真实路径之前，不得推测系统流转、字段来源或对象归属。 唯一归属原则：遇到“这个值到底挂在哪个对象上”“这个节点到底从哪里来”“这个字段到底由谁产出”时，必须沿源码找到唯一确定来源。找不到时继续检索或停止说明阻塞，不得先写逻辑。

Autodata: An agentic data scientist to create high quality synthetic data
articles.excerpt: We introduce Autodata, a general method that enables AI agents to act as data scientists who build high quality training and evaluation data. We show how to train (meta-optimize) such a data scientist agent, so that it learns to create even stronger data. We describe the overall formulation, and a specific practical implementation, Agentic Self-Instruct. We conduct experiments on computer science
articles.summary: 提出Autodata方法，让AI智能体充当数据科学家生成高质量训练与评估数据。通过元优化训练智能体使其能创建更优数据，具体实现为Agentic Self-Instruct。实验表明该方法能有效提升合成数据质量。

articles.title: OPERA: Aligning Open-Ended Reasoning via Objective Perplexity-based Reinforcement Learning
articles.excerpt: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has enabled LLMs to excel in objective reasoning tasks such as mathematics and code generation. However, applying RL to open-ended tasks, such as creative writing, remains challenging because LLM-as-a-judge reward models often exhibit stylistic biases and positional inconsistencies, leading to unstable supervision. To address this, we propose OPERA (Objective Perplexity
articles.summary: 针对开放任务RL中LLM-as-a-judge奖励模型存在风格偏好和位置不一致问题，提出OPERA（Objective Perplexity based RL）。通过客观困惑度校准奖励信号，在创意写作等开放任务上实现更稳定的对齐，提升模型灵活性与可靠性。

articles.title: Causal-rCM: A Unified Teacher-Forcing and Self-Forcing Open Recipe for Autoregressive Diffusion Distillation in Streaming Video Generation and Interactive World Models
articles.excerpt: Autoregressive video diffusion with causal diffusion transformers has emerged as a major paradigm for real-time streaming video generation and action-conditioned interactive world models. In this work, we extend rCM, an advanced diffusion distillation framework, to autoregressive video diffusion. The core philosophy of rCM lies in the complementarity between forward and reverse divergences, repres
articles.summary: 将扩散蒸馏框架rCM扩展到自回归视频扩散，提出Causal-rCM。融合教师强制与自我强制策略，支持实时流式视频生成和交互式世界模型，显著提升因果扩散Transformer的蒸馏效率与生成质量。

articles.title: OpenThoughts-Agent: Data Recipes for Agentic Models
articles.excerpt: Agentic language models dramatically expand the applications of AI yet little is publicly known about how to curate training data for broadly capable agents. Existing open efforts such as SWE-Smith, SERA, and Nemotron-Terminal typically target a single benchmark, leaving open the question of how to train models that generalize across diverse agentic tasks. The OpenThoughts-Agent (OT-Agent) project
articles.summary: OpenThoughts-Agent项目研究如何为通用智能体模型策划训练数据。针对现有开源工作仅针对单一基准的局限，提出数据配方方法，使模型能泛化到多种智能体任务，提升跨任务能力。

articles.title: World Value Models for Robotic Manipulation
articles.excerpt: Generalist value models play a pivotal role in scaling robotic policy learning from large-scale, mixed-quality data. Mathematically, accurate value estimation demands deep temporal understanding, requiring models to both ground the current belief using historical context and plan over future outcomes. However, most existing robotic value models are built on Vision-Language Model (VLM) backbones th
articles.summary: 提出World Value Models用于机器人操作，解决现有基于VLM的值模型缺乏深层时间理解的问题。新模型利用历史上下文锚定当前信念并对未来结果进行规划，在混合质量数据上实现更准确的值估计，提升策略学习效率。

articles.title: CineCap: Structured Reasoning with Spatio-Temporal Anchors for Cinematographic Video Captioning
articles.excerpt: Cinematographic captioning aims to describe how a video is filmed using professional film-language concepts such as camera movement, shot size, depth of field, composition, and shooting angle. This capability is important for fine-grained video understanding and controllable movie-quality video generation, yet remains underexplored in existing multimodal large language models. Unlike question-answ
articles.summary: 针对电影级视频描述任务，提出CineCap方法，利用时空锚点进行结构化推理。引入专业电影语言概念如镜头运动、景别、构图等，弥合多模态大语言模型在细粒度视频理解和可控视频生成方面的不足。

articles.title: Qwen-AgentWorld: Language World Models for General Agents
articles.excerpt: A world model predicts environment dynamics based on current observations and actions, serving as a core cognitive mechanism for reasoning and planning. In this work, we investigate how world modeling based on language models can further push the boundaries of general agents. (i) We first focus on building foundation models for agentic environment simulation. We introduce Qwen-AgentWorld-35B-A3B a
articles.summary: 探索基于语言模型的世界建模以推动通用智能体。提出Qwen-AgentWorld-35B-A3B等基础模型用于智能体环境模拟，通过预测环境动态增强智能体的推理与规划能力，在多种交互任务上取得进展。

articles.title: AGORA: An Archive-Grounded Benchmark for Agentic Workplace Document Reasoning
articles.excerpt: Large language models are increasingly deployed as agents that reason over documents rather than answer from parametric knowledge. We study archive-grounded reasoning: locating sparse evidence across a large, messy collection of workplace files, reconciling inconsistent terminology, units, and time conventions, and computing an answer. Existing benchmarks address only parts of this setting and non
articles.summary: 提出AGORA基准，聚焦档案扎根推理：在大量混乱的工作文档中定位分散证据、调和不一致的术语和单位，并计算答案。现有基准仅覆盖部分场景，AGORA填补了对复杂文档推理的评估空白。

articles.title: Escaping the Self-Confirmation Trap: An Execute-Distill-Verify Paradigm for Agentic Experience Learning
articles.excerpt: Experience-driven self-evolution is critical for large language model (LLM) agents to improve through open-world interaction. However, existing experience learning methods mostly rely on single-agent loops, where the same agent executes tasks, summarizes outcomes, and determines memory content. This setup makes agents vulnerable to the Self-Confirmation Trap: wrong-but-self-consistent trajectories
articles.summary: 针对单智能体经验学习中的“自我确认陷阱”，提出执行-蒸馏-验证（Execute-Distill-Verify）范式。通过分离任务执行、经验提炼与验证角色，避免模型在错误但自洽的轨迹上固化，提升开放世界交互中的自我进化能力。

articles.title: Holistic Data Scheduler for LLM Pre-training via Multi-Objective Reinforcement Learning
articles.excerpt: The composition of training data, governed by the diversity of sources and their mixing strategy, is a cornerstone of Large Language Model (LLM) pre-training. Online Data Mixing (ODM), the technique of adaptively adjusting data mixtures during training, has emerged as a promising direction to improve efficiency. However, existing methods are constrained by their reliance on a singular optimization
articles.summary: 提出面向LLM预训练的全方位数据调度器，基于多目标强化学习在线调整数据混合策略。克服现有方法依赖单一优化目标的局限，同时兼顾数据多样性、学习效率与模型性能，实现更高效的预训练。

articles.title: ReMMD: Realistic Multilingual Multi-Image Agentic Verification for Multimodal Misinformation Detection
articles.excerpt: Multimodal misinformation detection is increasingly important because viral posts now combine long multilingual narratives, several images, mixed provenance, and subtle text--image framing errors. Existing benchmarks and methods remain poorly matched to this setting: they usually isolate short captions, single images, binary labels, or one manipulation source, while agentic verification remains co
articles.summary: 针对多模态虚假信息检测，提出ReMMD基准与方法，应对长多语言叙事、多图像、混合来源等复杂场景。采用多语言多图像智能体验证，结合细粒度文本-图像错误检测，显著优于现有单模态或简单二分类方法。

articles.title: Can Language Model Agents be Helpful Circuit Explainers in Mechanistic Interpretability?
articles.excerpt: Mechanistic interpretability has made substantial progress in automatically localizing circuits, but explaining what localized components do remains labor-intensive and difficult to standardize. In this work, we study whether language model (LM) agents can assist with this explanation problem once a circuit has already been identified. We introduce AgenticInterpBench, a benchmark for circuit expla
articles.summary: 研究语言模型智能体能否辅助机械可解释性中的电路解释。引入AgenticInterpBench基准，评估智能体在给定电路后自动化生成解释的能力，旨在标准化和加速对已定位组件的功能分析。
